name: Kipu Health Behavioral & SUD Treatment API
what_it_does: Kipu Health REST API for behavioral health and substance use disorder (SUD) treatment EHR platform. Enables AI agents to manage patient admission and treatment records, handle SUD clinical documentation with 42 CFR Part 2 compliance, access residential and outpatient treatment workflows, manage billing for behavioral health services, integrate with utilization review and insurance authorization, retrieve outcome measurement data, handle compliance and incident reporting, and connect treatment data with PHP/IOP program management.
use_cases: Managing SUD patient admission and treatment records from clinical coordination agents
Accessing utilization review and insurance authorization data from billing compliance agents
Tracking treatment outcomes and quality measures from clinical analytics agents
Managing residential program capacity and census from operations agents
not_for: General mental health without substance use disorder treatment focus
Primary care without specialized SUD clinical documentation
Hospital inpatient psychiatric care without residential SUD workflows
best_when: A substance use disorder treatment center, behavioral health residential program, or PHP/IOP using Kipu wants AI agents to automate clinical documentation, billing, compliance reporting, and census management.
avoid_when: HIPAA+42 CFR Part 2: Substance use disorder treatment records receive the highest level of federal privacy protection. 42 CFR Part 2 requires explicit patient consent for virtually any disclosure. Automated sharing of SUD records without patient consent violates federal law. BAA mandatory.

auth.notes: Kipu uses OAuth 2.0 and API key for API access. Facility-level credentials with 42 CFR Part 2 compliant access controls. Partner program for technology integrations. Limited public developer documentation. Consent management built into data access layer.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — behavioral health enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: Miami, Florida. Founded 2012. Market leader for SUD and behavioral health treatment EHR. 2,500+ treatment centers. Used by residential, PHP, IOP, and outpatient programs. Strong 42 CFR Part 2 compliance built-in. Competes with Alleva and Procentive for SUD treatment market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA+42 CFR Part 2: SUD records have the highest federal privacy protection — explicit patient consent required for any disclosure
No public MCP server — OAuth2 and API key with facility-level 42 CFR Part 2 controls
No webhooks — polling required for clinical and census updates
42 CFR Part 2 compliance is non-negotiable — SUD record sharing without consent is a federal violation
Automated disclosure of SUD records to payers or health systems requires patient-signed consent forms
Residential census management is real-time sensitive — bed availability data must be near-real-time
agent_readiness.security_notes: SUD treatment records with highest federal privacy protection. HIPAA, 42 CFR Part 2, SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. BAA required. Explicit consent required for any disclosure.

security_score_components.security_notes: SUD treatment PHI. HIPAA, 42 CFR Part 2, SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. Highest federal privacy protection. Explicit consent mandatory.
